target_name: OpenClaw Attack — Is Evidence Trail Provable or Just Claimed?
context: OpenClaw oracle (q-agi-056): OpenClaw's weakness is no evidence trail. Their attack vector against Solace: 'You CLAIM to have evidence but where can I see it?' The /inspector page (Solace Inspector QA board) should demonstrate real sealed evidence. Does the page contain keywords proving evidence exists: evidence, proof, seal, hash, sha256, verifiable? If /inspector returns 404 or zero proof keywords, OpenClaw wins this round.
